DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH VEHICLE INSPECTION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT WILL ORDER THAT THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT GO FORWARD ON JANUARY 15, 2014 COMMENCING AT 9:00 AM; DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE INSPECTION WILL TAKE PLACE COMMENCING AT 9:00 AM ON JANUARY 16, 2014 AND THE DEPOSITION OF FORD'S PMK WILL COMMENCE TWO HOURS AFTER THE COMPLETION OF THE VEHICLE INSPECTION AND CONTINUE FROM DAY TO DAY UNTIL COMPLETED. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; NOT REPORTED

ARGUED AND THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: THE COURT WILL ORDER THAT THE DEPOSITION OF PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT GO FORWARD ON JANUARY 15, 2014 COMMENCING AT 9:00 AM; DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE INSPECTION WILL TAKE PLACE COMMENCING AT 9:00 AM ON JANUARY 16, 2014 AND THE DEPOSITION OF FORD'S PMK WILL COMMENCE TWO HOURS AFTER THE COMPLETION OF THE VEHICLE INSPECTION AND CONTINUE FROM DAY TO DAY UNTIL COMPLETED. NO MONETARY SANCTIONS WILL BE IMPOSED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-23-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Compliance With Vehicle Inspection And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH VEHICLE INSPECTION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS

Appearances: Jesper I. Rasmussen of Lafayette & Kumagai (415.357.4600) for defendant and moving party; Davin D. Barry of the Barry Law Firm (310.386.7463) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The court will order that the deposition of plaintiff's expert go forward on January 15, 2014 commencing at 9:00 am; defendant's vehicle inspection will take place commencing at 9:00 am on January 16, 2014 and the deposition of Ford's PMK will commence two hours after the completion of the vehicle inspection and continue from day to day until completed. No monetary sanctions will be imposed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Not Reported (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Plaintiff'S Expert Witness Deposition Or Exclude Expert Testimony, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S EXPERT WITNESS DEPOSITION OR EXCLUDE EXPERT TESTIMONY, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

Appearances: Jesper I. Rasmussen of Lafayette & Kumagai (415.357.4600) for defendant and moving party; Davin D. Barry of the Barry Law Firm (310.386.7463) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.

Argued and the Court rules as follows: The court will order that the deposition of plaintiff's expert go forward on January 15, 2014 commencing at 9:00 am; defendant's vehicle inspection will take place commencing at 9:00 am on January 16, 2014 and the deposition of Ford's PMK will commence two hours after the completion of the vehicle inspection and continue from day to day until completed. No monetary sanctions will be imposed. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Not reported (302/JPT)
